purpose: Define Phase A HR import and historical-control contract for clean migration without connecting old databases or storing sensitive raw HR payloads in repo.

hrSources.notes: Config reference for HR origin, not raw credentials or private URLs.

hrImportRuns.notes: Import run metadata, dry-run summary and validation status.

hrRowsStaging.notes: Sanitized staging rows only; no raw DPI, bank data, raw phone/email or raw evidence.

visitSourceMap.notes: Stable mapping from HR rows to platform visits.

shopperSourceMap.notes: Stable mapping for historical shoppers from HR without using sensitive raw identifiers.

certificationSourceMap.notes: Preserve certifications already presented so they are not requested again.

importConflicts.notes: Conflicts between HR, platform, shopper identity, visit assignment, questionnaire and payments.

importModes.dry_run: Validate and report only. No writes to operational collections.
importModes.staging_sanitized: Write sanitized staging only under explicit gate.
importModes.promote_reviewed: Promote reviewed rows to operational collections under explicit gate.
importModes.rollback: Create rollback plan/metadata; no destructive delete by default.

statuses.pending_source_review: Source exists but has not been validated.
statuses.sanitized_preview: Sanitized row preview generated, not promoted.
statuses.review_required: Conflict or missing source data requires review.
statuses.approved_for_promote: Approved to promote to operational collections.

hrBusinessRules.visitsThroughJuneExecuted: Rows through June must not be re-opened as visits pending unless HR explicitly marks otherwise and review approves.
hrBusinessRules.junePaymentFocus: June open operational work is payment/liquidation control, not visit execution.
hrBusinessRules.certificationsPreserved: Already-presented certifications must map to certification records and not be requested again.
hrBusinessRules.historicalShoppersPreserved: Historical shoppers from HR must become shopper records or source maps under review, not raw imports.
hrBusinessRules.questionnaireRouting: Questionnaire source can be CXOrbia, TyAOnline, external platform, general link or HR per-visit link by project/visit.
hrBusinessRules.assignmentSync: Assignments from HR and platform require stable keys and assignmentSource/assignmentSyncStatus tracking.

dedupePolicy.notes: Never merge shoppers, visits or assignments only because names look similar.

auditRequirements: all import runs require actorId, source, mode, source period and auditRef
all promoted rows require importRunId and original sanitized hrRowId
all conflicts require resolution state and reviewer
all HR writebacks require Make/outbox gate and providerRef
rollback cannot physically delete without retention approval
